functionEntry.name: _pushFreshSettingsMenu
functionEntry.documentation:
Helper to push a fresh Settings menu with up-to-date subtitles.
Called after changing a setting so the parent menu reflects the change.

functionEntry.name: add
functionEntry.documentation: Add a log entry with automatic timestamp.

functionEntry.name: getEntries
functionEntry.documentation: Get all log entries (oldest first).

functionEntry.name: clear
functionEntry.documentation: Clear all log entries.

functionEntry.name: getTotalCount
functionEntry.documentation: Get the total number of entries ever written.

functionEntry.name: _removeFirst
functionEntry.documentation: Remove the first element from an array (returns new array).

functionEntry.name: getStoredCount
functionEntry.documentation: Get the number of currently stored entries.

functionEntry.name: _timestamp
functionEntry.documentation: Generate a short timestamp string like "14:32:05".

functionEntry.name: transmit
functionEntry.documentation:
Transmit a hold payload to the phone via the message queue.
Handles batching for large sample sets.

functionEntry.name: setPrepType
functionEntry.documentation: Persists the prep type setting.

functionEntry.name: getLungVolume
functionEntry.documentation: Returns the stored lung volume, defaulting to "FULL".

functionEntry.name: setLungVolume
functionEntry.documentation: Persists the lung volume setting.

functionEntry.name: getTimeOfDay
functionEntry.documentation:
Returns the current time-of-day bucket based on the watch clock.
Morning : 03:00 – 10:59
Day : 11:00 – 17:59
Night : 18:00 – 02:59

functionEntry.name: getPrepType
functionEntry.documentation: Returns the stored prep type, defaulting to "NO_PREP".

functionEntry.name: saveSessionData
functionEntry.documentation:
Save the completed hold to persistent storage AND transmit to phone.
Dual approach: save locally (in case phone isn't listening) and also
transmit immediately (in case phone IS listening right now).

functionEntry.name: onSensorEvent
functionEntry.documentation: Sensor callback – must accept a single Sensor.Info parameter and return nothing.

functionEntry.name: getUnsyncedHolds
functionEntry.documentation: Get all unsynced holds.

functionEntry.name: clearSynced
functionEntry.documentation: Clear all synced holds to free storage space.

functionEntry.name: getHolds
functionEntry.documentation: Get all stored holds.

functionEntry.name: getUnsyncedCount
functionEntry.documentation: Get count of unsynced holds.

functionEntry.name: markSynced
functionEntry.documentation: Mark a hold as synced by ID.

functionEntry.name: removeAt
functionEntry.documentation: Remove element at index from array (returns new array).

functionEntry.name: saveHold
functionEntry.documentation:
Save a completed hold to persistent storage.
Returns the hold ID.
